requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Transport — UN 38.3 and battery shipping
requirement_topic.zh: 危险货物运输——UN 38.3与电池运输
requirement_topic.zht: 危險貨物運輸——UN 38.3與電池運輸

summary.en: Lithium batteries are dangerous goods for transport regardless of destination. Shipments to Zambia must comply with international transport rules: UN 38.3 testing (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, sub-section 38.3) is required, evidenced by a UN 38.3 test summary, and the consignment must follow the applicable modal rules — IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions for air, and IMDG Code for the ocean leg to Dar es Salaam or Durban, then ADR-style road transport for the landlocked inland haul into Zambia. Proper packing, marking, labelling (Class 9, UN 3480/UN 3481), state-of-charge limits, and a lithium-battery handling/declaration document apply. Because Zambia is landlocked, the inland road segment from the port is a significant part of the dangerous-goods chain.
summary.zh: 锂电池无论运往何处，在运输上均属危险货物。运往赞比亚的货物须符合国际运输规则：须完成UN 38.3测试（《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分38.3节），以UN 38.3测试摘要为证；货物须遵循适用的运输方式规则——航空适用IATA危险货物规则／ICAO技术细则，至达累斯萨拉姆或德班的海运段适用IMDG规则，随后进入赞比亚的内陆陆运适用ADR式公路运输。须按规定包装、标记、加贴标签（第9类，UN 3480/UN 3481）、遵守荷电状态限值，并备有锂电池操作／申报文件。由于赞比亚为内陆国，自港口起的内陆陆运段是危险货物链的重要部分。
summary.zht: 鋰電池無論運往何處，在運輸上均屬危險貨物。運往尚比亞的貨物須符合國際運輸規則：須完成UN 38.3測試（《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分38.3節），以UN 38.3測試摘要為證；貨物須遵循適用的運輸方式規則——航空適用IATA危險貨物規則／ICAO技術細則，至達累斯薩拉姆或德班的海運段適用IMDG規則，隨後進入尚比亞的內陸陸運適用ADR式公路運輸。須按規定包裝、標記、加貼標籤（第9類，UN 3480/UN 3481）、遵守荷電狀態限值，並備有鋰電池操作／申報文件。由於尚比亞為內陸國，自港口起的內陸陸運段是危險貨物鏈的重要部分。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, sub-section 38.3 (UN 38.3) — UNECE
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions (air)
IMDG Code (sea leg to Dar es Salaam / Durban); ADR-style road transport for inland haul
UN 3480 (lithium-ion batteries) / UN 3481 (lithium-ion batteries in or with equipment)

summary.en: China applies the same international UN 38.3 basis for exporting lithium batteries, implemented domestically through GB 38031 (for power batteries) and the requirement for a UN 38.3 test summary plus an identification appraisal report (鉴定报告) for air/sea export from Chinese ports. Chinese exporters typically already hold a UN 38.3 test summary and prepare dangerous-goods declarations for the carrier. This documentation is directly reusable for the Zambia route because UN 38.3 is an international standard, though the modal mix (sea to Dar es Salaam/Durban plus inland road) and destination paperwork differ.
summary.zh: 中国出口锂电池同样以国际UN 38.3为基础，国内通过GB 38031（动力电池）实施，并要求在自中国港口空运／海运出口时具备UN 38.3测试摘要及鉴定报告。中国出口商通常已持有UN 38.3测试摘要，并为承运人准备危险货物申报。由于UN 38.3为国际标准，该文件可直接复用于赞比亚路线，但运输方式组合（海运至达累斯萨拉姆／德班加内陆陆运）及目的地文书有所不同。
summary.zht: 中國出口鋰電池同樣以國際UN 38.3為基礎，國內透過GB 38031（動力電池）實施，並要求在自中國港口空運／海運出口時具備UN 38.3測試摘要及鑑定報告。中國出口商通常已持有UN 38.3測試摘要，並為承運人準備危險貨物申報。由於UN 38.3為國際標準，該文件可直接複用於尚比亞路線，但運輸方式組合（海運至達累斯薩拉姆／德班加內陸陸運）及目的地文書有所不同。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test summary — required for air/sea export from China
GB 38031 — Electric vehicle traction battery safety requirements (power batteries)
China dangerous-goods identification appraisal report (鉴定报告) for export consignments

gap.en: UN 38.3 is an international standard, so a valid UN 38.3 test summary already held for Chinese export is largely reusable for Zambia — this is the smallest gap of the five rows. Remaining points: (1) ensure the UN 38.3 summary is current for the exact cell/pack model and matches the BOM; (2) prepare full modal documentation for the actual route (sea IMDG to Dar es Salaam or Durban, then ADR-style road into landlocked Zambia), which adds a road dangerous-goods leg not present in a direct sea shipment; (3) verify packing, Class 9 marking/labelling, watt-hour ratings, and state-of-charge limits for each carrier; (4) confirm any destination-side dangerous-goods or transit-country (Tanzania/South Africa) requirements for the inland haul.
gap.zh: UN 38.3为国际标准，因此为中国出口已持有的有效UN 38.3测试摘要在赞比亚大体可复用——这是五行中最小的差距。剩余要点：（1）确保UN 38.3摘要对确切电芯／电池组型号现行有效且与BOM一致；（2）为实际路线准备完整运输方式文件（海运IMDG至达累斯萨拉姆或德班，随后ADR式公路进入内陆赞比亚），这增加了直达海运所没有的公路危险货物段；（3）核实各承运人的包装、第9类标记／标签、瓦时额定值及荷电状态限值；（4）确认内陆陆运在目的地侧及过境国（坦桑尼亚／南非）的任何危险货物要求。
gap.zht: UN 38.3為國際標準，因此為中國出口已持有的有效UN 38.3測試摘要在尚比亞大體可複用——這是五行中最小的差距。剩餘要點：（1）確保UN 38.3摘要對確切電芯／電池組型號現行有效且與BOM一致；（2）為實際路線準備完整運輸方式文件（海運IMDG至達累斯薩拉姆或德班，隨後ADR式公路進入內陸尚比亞），這增加了直達海運所沒有的公路危險貨物段；（3）核實各承運人的包裝、第9類標記／標籤、瓦時額定值及荷電狀態限值；（4）確認內陸陸運在目的地側及過境國（坦尚尼亞／南非）的任何危險貨物要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for transport — UN 38.3 testing and modal dangerous-goods rules (IATA/ICAO air, IMDG sea, ADR-style road inland) apply to all lithium-battery consignments to landlocked Zambia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport — UN 38.3 test summary and dangerous-goods identification appraisal required for air/sea export from China

source.publisher: UNECE — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria (UN 38.3)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is an international transport standard, so a current UN 38.3 test summary held for Chinese export is largely reusable for Zambia — the smallest gap of the five rows. Exporters should still confirm the summary matches the exact model, and prepare full modal dangerous-goods documentation for the real route: IMDG sea to Dar es Salaam or Durban, then ADR-style road into landlocked Zambia, including Class 9 marking, watt-hour ratings, and state-of-charge limits.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3为国际运输标准，因此为中国出口持有的现行UN 38.3测试摘要在赞比亚大体可复用——为五行中最小的差距。出口商仍应确认摘要与确切型号一致，并为实际路线准备完整运输方式危险货物文件：海运IMDG至达累斯萨拉姆或德班，随后ADR式公路进入内陆赞比亚，包括第9类标记、瓦时额定值及荷电状态限值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3為國際運輸標準，因此為中國出口持有的現行UN 38.3測試摘要在尚比亞大體可複用——為五行中最小的差距。出口商仍應確認摘要與確切型號一致，並為實際路線準備完整運輸方式危險貨物文件：海運IMDG至達累斯薩拉姆或德班，隨後ADR式公路進入內陸尚比亞，包括第9類標記、瓦時額定值及荷電狀態限值。
